trade-and-tariffs.summary: Supports fair trade and energy exports, particularly coal and natural gas to global markets.

economy-and-jobs.summary: Libertarian-leaning conservative who champions deregulation, cryptocurrency, and economic freedom.

healthcare-and-medicare.summary: Opposes government-run healthcare and supports market-based reforms and reducing insurance mandates.

immigration-and-border-security.summary: Supports strict border security, opposes amnesty, and backs tough immigration enforcement.

education-and-student-debt.summary: Opposes student loan forgiveness and supports school choice and local education control.

national-defense-and-military.summary: Supports strong defense spending and Wyoming's nuclear missile installations.

climate-and-environment.summary: Opposes climate regulations and mandates, strongly defending Wyoming's coal and fossil fuel industries.

criminal-justice-reform.summary: Generally favors tough-on-crime policies with a libertarian streak on some sentencing issues.

foreign-policy-and-diplomacy.summary: Supports strong national defense and American leadership while favoring restraint in foreign entanglements.

technology-and-ai-regulation.summary: The Senate's leading cryptocurrency champion who authored the Responsible Financial Innovation Act for digital asset regulation.

social-security-and-medicare.summary: Supports preserving benefits while favoring reforms, and has proposed using Bitcoin as a reserve asset.

gun-policy-and-2nd-amendment.summary: Staunch Second Amendment advocate who opposes all gun control measures.

infrastructure-and-transportation.summary: Supports rural infrastructure investment for Wyoming but was skeptical of the 2021 bill's spending.

housing-and-affordability.summary: Favors deregulation and market-based approaches over federal housing programs.

energy-policy-and-oil-gas.summary: Fiercely defends Wyoming's coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries against any federal restrictions.

reproductive-rights.summary: Firmly pro-life and supports state and federal abortion restrictions.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Opposes the Equality Act and federal LGBTQ mandates, though she faced backlash for anti-trans comments.

drug-policy.summary: Opposes federal marijuana legalization though her libertarian instincts create some nuance.

voting-rights.summary: Opposes federal voting mandates and supports state control over election administration.

taxes-and-spending.summary: Strongly supports tax cuts and dramatically reducing federal spending, with a libertarian fiscal philosophy.

labor-and-unions.summary: Opposes the PRO Act and expanded union mandates, supporting right-to-work policies.

privacy-and-surveillance.summary: Her libertarian leanings give her more concern about government surveillance than typical Republicans.

trade-and-tariffs.summary: Supports fair trade and energy exports, particularly Wyoming's coal and natural gas to global markets.
